title: Drill Log to Shot Diagram Import
notes: Adds Create Shot Diagram from Drill Log to the Drill Log menu.
Transfers populated Drill Log holes into a new Shot Diagram while preserving the physical column-and-row orientation.
Converts each 16-column by 34-row Drill Log page into up to three vertically stacked 16-column by 15-row Shot Diagram pages.
Copies depth, overburden, wet/dirt/bad flags, notes, structured hole conditions, hole diameter, pattern definitions, and pattern assignments.
Leaves stemming, primary load, secondary load, and timing blank so loading work can begin in the Shot Diagram.
Shows a review screen before transfer and another confirmation before replacing the current Shot Diagram.
Saves the previous Shot Diagram as one Undo Import snapshot and never changes the source Drill Log.
Preserves m39.7 Timing Sequence, Physical Keyboard, Touch Keypad, selections, movement, GPS, calculations, PDF/JSON workflows, and offline support.
